choreography.description: Stick figure character slides in from the left with a bounce-in effect, scaling slightly from 0.9 to 1.
The stick figure performs a simple dance routine, moving its arms and legs in a rhythmic pattern. The head nods slightly to the beat, and the figure sways side to side.
The stick figure holds a final pose with arms raised, then fades out gently over the last 1.5 seconds.
